name: gitstack
description: Bundle git authoring, GitHub operations, and publish workflows around a shared ghops CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Bundle git commit, GitHub, and publish workflows in one plugin.
interface.longDescription: GitStack bundles git-commit, GitHub specialist skills, and Yeet around one shared ghops runtime so commit, review, release, and publish flows stay aligned.
defaultPrompt: Review this repo and summarize the open PRs.
Turn these local changes into a draft PR.
Create a clean commit and open or reuse the PR.
